name: Template Design – CR3
content: Modify the objective so that instead of minimizing the total number of printed sheets, the model minimizes the maximum production load across all templates. All existing constraints, including slot usage and demand satisfaction, remain unchanged.
value_info: `demand`: List of required quantities for each variation.

var3.descr: `max_load`: The maximum value among all template productions.

complexity.difficulty_rationale: Introduces a new bottleneck variable and redefines the optimization target around maximum template load instead of total production.

cr_impact.notes: Variable families: production and max_load. Constraint groups: maximum_template_load_tracking. Objective change: modify.
